faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about Echo. Find answers to common questions.

items.question: What is Echo?
items.answer: Echo is a platform that lets you collect, analyze, and showcase user feedback with one API. Create feedback pages, use our widget, or integrate our API directly into your product.

items.question: How does the feedback widget work?
items.answer: Echo's widget integrates seamlessly into your website or app. Users can leave feedback directly from your product, and you can manage everything from a single dashboard.

items.question: What kind of insights does the AI generate?
items.answer: Our AI automatically analyzes feedback to detect trends, sentiment, recurring themes, and actionable insights. You get automatic summaries that help you understand what your users want.

items.question: When will Echo be available?
items.answer: We're working hard to launch Echo soon. By joining the waitlist, you'll be among the first to access it when it's available.

items.question: Is it free?
items.answer: Yes, Echo will have a free plan to get started. We'll also offer premium plans with advanced AI features and higher feedback volumes.

seo.title: Echo | Waitlist - Collect and analyze feedback with AI
seo.description: Echo is the intelligent platform to collect, analyze, and showcase user feedback. Create feedback pages, use our widget, or integrate our API. Powered by AI for automatic insights.
seo.keywords: feedback, user feedback, feedback widget, feedback API, AI analytics, user insights, product feedback, echo
